---
title: "‘Leaves of Promise: April.’ Unsigned."
---

## ‘Leaves of Promise: April.’ Unsigned.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1901
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (April 1901) 138-9.

### Notes

This series, \'Leaves for the Months\', is identified as by Yonge in the obituary in <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (April 19010.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
